title: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Mental Health Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Mental Health Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Agricultural Laborers Foster Families Mental Health Issues Older Adults Substance Use Disorder Issues Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF VIRIDIAN MANAGEMENT LOW INCOME RENTAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a website for properties that offer affordable, low-income, and subsidized apartments. Properties may have waitlists. 200 E Main Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Varies by property. Must meet income guidelines. Some properties require at least one household member to be an older adult, an adult with a disability, a person with chronic mental illness, or a farm laborer. Hours: Varies by property Email (541) 426-3820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VIRIDIAN MANAGEMENT LOW INCOME RENTAL HOUSING
